---
title: "courses"
description: |
  Teaching is part of the job
---

# Stanislaus State

## Lecturer

GEOG 2012 - Intro to Physical Geography Lab, Spring 2026 <br>
GEOG 2350 - Water and Power, Spring 2026 <br>
GEOG 3020 - Human Ecology, Spring 2026 <br>

# UC Santa Barbara

## Teaching Associate

GEOG W8 - Intro to Global Warming, Summer 2025

## Teaching Assistant

GEOG 176A - Intro to GIS, Fall 2021
